projectDescription: A monorepo for Zilong Liang's personal websites — a landing page, a technical blog, and a daily-life journal — built with Astro and managed by a custom journal CLI.
keyFeatures: Three Astro-based personal websites: landing page (www), technical blog (tech), and daily-life journal (days)
Custom `journal` CLI for creating notes and post drafts and publishing them
Shared `@zlliang/theme` package providing Astro components, styles, and utilities across websites
Shared `@zlliang/rehype` package for custom rehype plugins
pnpm workspace monorepo structure with coordinated build and dev scripts
Content model with typed notes (regular, link, collection, quote, til, post) and published posts
Bilingual support: landing page has both English and Chinese versions
Deployed on Vercel with analytics and speed insights
publicApiSurface: @zlliang/theme (shared Astro components: Header, Footer, Link, PageTitle, Pagination, Section)
content/notes/**/*.md (note schema: no, title, created, type, post, draft)
content/posts/**/*.md (post schema: title, created, series, pinned, draft)
